INTRVNS_MDCTN_DSCHRG_CD INTRVNS_MDCTN_DSCHRG_CD O0110H1C Other: IV Medications (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received IV medications in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
995 VASOACTV_ADMSN_CD VASOACTV_ADMSN_CD O0110H2A Other: IV - Vasoactive medications (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received vasoactive IV medications days one through three (on admission) of becoming a
